description_long: This is a white, cylindrical cup with a slightly faceted exterior and a smooth, even rim. The front of the cup features the phrase 'World's Best Detective' printed in a stylish, black serif font, which stands out against the plain white surface. The cup has no visible handle or lid, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The surface appears matte and hard, likely made from ceramic or porcelain, with a uniform color throughout. The interior is also white and smooth, suitable for holding liquids. This cup is typical of those found in kitchens, offices, or urban cafes, and is designed for everyday use.
description: A white, faceted ceramic cup with 'World's Best Detective' printed in black on the front and a smooth, handleless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'World's Best Detective' text in black on a white surface.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain white surface and a small part of the text barely visible at the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely plain white surface with no visible text or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mostly plain white with a slight glimpse of the text at the edge.
